arts.ttl: Premier League explain why Marcus Rashford's controversial penalty was given against Man City
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola was booked for his protestations against Aston Villa's penalty on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Roy Keane jokes that Kevin De Bruyne should join MAN UNITED this summer - after the Man City star revealed it's NOT his decision to leave and refused to rule out staying in Premier League
arts.sum: Speaking to the written media on Saturday evening, De Bruyne revealed that he was shocked and surprised when he was informed that his contract would not be renewed.

arts.ttl: Premier League issue explanation on Man City VAR decision that left Pep Guardiola furious
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola was shown a yellow card for his furious protestations after Aston Villa were awarded a penalty for a foul by Ruben Dias on Jacob Ramsey

arts.ttl: BREAKING - Premier League release VAR statement after controversial Man City penalty
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola was booked after complaining about a penalty being given against Aston Villa

arts.ttl: James McAtee future: Bayer Leverkusen in 'direct contact' over summer move for Man City attacker
arts.sum: Bundesliga side Bayer Leverkusen reportedly make direct contact over a possible summer move for Manchester City attacker James McAtee in the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: Pep Guardiola's side 'given green light' to sign £63m goalkeeper as Man United, Chelsea suffer blow
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly handed a major boost in their pursuit of Porto goalkeeper Diogo Costa ahead of the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Exclusive Tottenham transfer news: Spurs rekindle Marcus Rashford interest
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are interested in signing Marcus Rashford this summer if Aston Villa decide against purchasing him on a permanent deal, FootballTransfers understands. Despite this, Tottenham will rekindle their interest in Rashford if Villa decide against signing him on a permanent deal this summer.

arts.ttl: Man City v Villa team news: Rashford over Watkins, Savinho benched
arts.sum: Double Gameweek 33 continues with a huge match at the Etihad Stadium The post Man City v Villa team news: Rashford over Watkins, Savinho benched appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Man City vs. Aston Villa confirmed lineups: Foden, Grealish, Rashford, Watkins decisions made for crucial Premier League clash
arts.sum: Manchester City and Aston Villa confirm their starting lineups for tonight's Premier League clash at the Etihad Stadium.

arts.ttl: McAtee and Kovacic return for Premier League clash with Aston Villa
arts.sum: Former Academy player McAtee made his first Premier League start for the Blues in our 5-2 win over Crystal Palace in our last home match, scoring our fourth goal. City have won our last 14 Premier League home games against Aston Villa, scoring at least twice in each of the last 13.
